title: sofr / repo / market structure | Unknown | SOFR Daily Snapshot - April 9, 2026
summary: SOFR closed at 3.57% on April 9, 2026, down 2 basis points from the prior day's 3.59%. The rate has trended downward over the past week, declining from 3.66% on April 2 to the current level, representing an 9 basis point cumulative decline.
